zh.Sampford-Peverell, Devon, England: 英國戴文桑普福德 培維勒爾
zh.Blackborough, Devon, England: 英國英格蘭戴文布拉可波洛
zh.Sandford, Peverell, Devonshire, England: 英國英格蘭戴文桑德福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Cobham於大約1302年出生在英國戴文桑德福德時，她的父親John Cobham41歲，母親Amicia Bolhay23歲。她於大約1320年與Sir Hugh Peverell在英國英格蘭戴文桑德福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1385年8月2日在英國戴文享年84歲，埋葬在英國肯特可巴姆。

zh-hans.Sampford-Peverell, Devon, England: 英国戴文桑普福德 培維勒爾

zh-hans.Sandford, Peverell, Devonshire, England: 英国英格兰戴文桑德福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Cobham于大约1302年出生在英国戴文桑德福德时，她的父亲John Cobham41岁，母亲Amicia Bolhay23岁。她于大约1320年与Sir Hugh Peverell在英国英格兰戴文桑德福德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1385年8月2日在英国戴文享年84岁，埋葬在英国肯特可巴姆。

nameMeanings.name: Cobham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of at least three places in southern England called Cobham, in Kent, Surrey, and Sussex.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Cobham was born about 1302, in Sandford, Devon, England, her father, John Cobham, was 41 and her mother, Amicia Bolhay, was 23. She married Sir Hugh Peverell about 1320, in Sandford, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 2 August 1385, in Devon, England, at the age of 84, and was buried in Cobham, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Cobham est née environ 1302, à Sandford, Devon, Angleterre, son père, John Cobham, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Amicia Bolhay, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Hugh Peverell environ 1320, à Sandford, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 2 août 1385, à Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterrée à Cobham, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Cobham um 1302 in Sandford, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Cobham 41 und ihre Mutter Amicia Bolhay 23. Sie hat um 1320 in Sandford, Devon, England, United Kingdom Sir Hugh Peverell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 2. August 1385 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Devon, England und wurde in Cobham, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Cobham è nata il circa 1302 nel Sandford, Devon, England, sua padre, John Cobham, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Amicia Bolhay, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Sir Hugh Peverell circa 1320, nel Sandford, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 2 agosto 1385, nel Devon, England, all'età di 84 anni, e fu sepolta a Cobham, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Cobhamが約1302年にイギリスデボンサンドフォードで生まれた時，父John Cobhamは41歳，母Amicia Bolhayは23歳であった。約1320年にイギリスイギリスデボンサンドフォードでSir Hugh Peverellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1385年8月2日にイギリスデボンで84歳で死去し，イギリスケントコブハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Cobham(이)가 대략 1302년 영국 데폰 샌드퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Cobham(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Amicia Bolhay(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1320년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 샌드퍼드에서 Sir Hugh Peverell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1385년 8월 2일 영국 데폰에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 컵함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Cobham nasceu aproximadamente 1302, em Sandford, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Cobham, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Amicia Bolhay, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Hugh Peverell aproximadamente 1320, em Sandford, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 2 de agosto de 1385, em Devon, Inglaterra, com 84 anos, e foi sepultada em Cobham, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Cobham родилась около 1302 г. в местности сэндфорд, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени John Cobham было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Amicia Bolhay, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Hugh Peverell около 1320 г. в местности сэндфорд, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 2 августа 1385 г. в местности девон, Англия в возрасте 84 лет и была похоронена в местности кобхам, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Cobham nació aproximadamente 1302, en Sandford, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, John Cobham, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Amicia Bolhay, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Sir Hugh Peverell aproximadamente 1320, en Sandford, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 2 de agosto de 1385, en Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 84 años, y fue sepultada en Cobham, Kent, Inglaterra.
